* 45 C.F.R. part 46.102(l)(2), 21 C.F.R. part 56; 42 U.S.C. 241(d); 5 U.S.C. 552a; 44 U.S.C. 3501 et seq.
† Rabies PEP consists of 1 dose of human rabies immune globulin (HRIG) (20 IU per kg of body weight), followed by 4 rabies vaccine doses on days 0, 3, 7, and 14. HRIG is administered on the same day as the first rabies vaccine dose and is only indicated for persons who have not previously been vaccinated against rabies ( Rabies post-exposure prophylaxis | CDC ).
§ Cost information for rabies postexposure vaccination was obtained by interviewing the farm owners and the herd veterinarian. Veterinary costs to the farm owners were obtained from service bills provided by the herd veterinarian.
